data.body: 76d2 BOX DEPLOY attempt 1 FAILED (fail-safe worked: nginx rolled back cleanly, Gerrit UNAFFECTED). Two real deploy-blocking bugs in landed code (hermetic tests missed; only real deploy catches): (1) Dockerfile.opcert (ee0b) OpenSSH check uses 'ssh-keygen -V' (wrong flag, errors -> empty version -> always fails); should be 'ssh -V'. (2) nginx template (76d2) guard map fails nginx -t: 'could not build map_hash, increase map_hash_bucket_size: 64' — 48-char guard value overflows default. AWS infra + guard materialize + SSM key all OK. Filing discovered bug + fixing both, then redeploy.
